task_completion.description: Navigate to the Jenkins Credentials page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins web interface is visible, showing the 'Credentials' or 'Global Credentials' page.
The 'Add Credentials' form is open in the Jenkins interface.
The 'Kind' dropdown menu on the Add Credentials form is set to 'Username with password'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required credential details into the form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are filled out: 'Username' contains 'deploy-user', 'ID' contains 'deploy-credentials', 'Description' contains 'Deployment server credentials', and the 'Password' field contains masked characters.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the credential creation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins credentials list page is visible and displays the newly created credential with the ID 'deploy-credentials' and the description 'Deployment server credentials'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Jenkins web GUI to create the credential
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser navigating the Jenkins UI, rather than terminal windows using curl or Jenkins CLI commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Jenkins application
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Jenkins UI elements (sidebar, header, breadcrumbs) are visible, confirming it is the real application and not a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use the Jenkins Script Console to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen filling out the standard 'Add Credentials' HTML form, not executing Groovy scripts in the Jenkins Script Console.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected credential ID is 'deploy-credentials'. The expected username is 'deploy-user'. The expected description is 'Deployment server credentials'. The password to be entered is 'S3cureP@ss' (which will likely appear masked as dots/asterisks in screenshots). The agent must use the Jenkins web interface to add these credentials.
